semantic.role: Define and enforce layered architecture constraints to maintain clean dependency direction in the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Document the specific rules for domain isolation, interface dependency, and API layer separation.
Provide the severity and rationale for each architectural constraint.
Serve as a reference for developers and automated tools to validate layer compliance.
outOfScope: Implementation details of infrastructure or CLI modules.
User interface design or frontend concerns.
Specific utility or helper function implementations.

English.purpose: This document establishes the layered architecture constraints for the ArchSpine project, ensuring that high-level modules do not depend on low-level modules, and that the domain layer remains pure and independent.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and architects working on the ArchSpine system. It is used during code reviews, linting, and automated architecture checks to enforce dependency direction and maintain separation of concerns.
key_takeaways: Domain modules (src/domain/) must not import from infrastructure or CLI layers.
Domain modules should only depend on internal domain logic or generic utilities.
API layers (src/api/) are allowed to call only Service or Domain layers, not bypass business logic.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档为ArchSpine项目定义分层架构约束，确保高层模块不依赖低层模块，并保持领域层的纯粹性和独立性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档适用于ArchSpine系统的开发者和架构师。在代码审查、静态检查以及自动化架构验证中，用于强制依赖方向并维持关注点分离。
key_takeaways: 领域模块（src/domain/）不得导入基础设施或CLI层。
领域模块只能依赖内部领域逻辑或通用工具。
API层（src/api/）仅允许调用服务层或领域层，不得绕过业务逻辑。
